response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and open-source experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial automation contexts, with only one brief role involving LabWindows/CVI and no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols required for this role; the resume is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang and web-focused work, with no clear alignment to high-performance on-prem/cloud industrial platforms.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source development experience with diverse technologies
Proven ability to lead and mentor through workshops, CI/CD setup, and team collaboration
Demonstrated experience with event-driven systems and distributed platforms (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ or STL usage in professional context
No evidence of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT, or industrial protocols
Lacks experience with high-performance multi-threaded or networked C++ systems for automation
